charlatan v0.4.1.92
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Contributing to charlatan
  • Changelog

Create fake coordinates

Source: R/coordinates.R
coordinates.Rd

Create fake coordinates

ch_lon(n = 1)

ch_lat(n = 1)

ch_position(n = 1, bbox = NULL)

Arguments

n

(integer) number of things to get, any non-negative integer
bbox

a bounding box of the form [w,s,e,n]

See also

CoordinateProvider

Examples

ch_lon()

#> [1] -1.569487
ch_lon(10)

#>  [1]  -32.92167  -65.30133    5.18906  113.93384 -154.28528   23.40691
#>  [7]  168.71627   99.13091  102.72212  147.23870

ch_lat()

#> [1] -21.71671
ch_lat(10)

#>  [1]  79.88143 -57.67989 -26.36765 -24.84572 -72.27158 -83.47260  20.99779
#>  [8] -60.84494  38.10775  69.06575

ch_position()

#> [1]  70.15725 -47.56034
ch_position(10)

#> [[1]]
#> [1] -62.19502  89.14985
#> 
#> [[2]]
#> [1] 133.24081  37.00481
#> 
#> [[3]]
#> [1]  20.22704 -49.75135
#> 
#> [[4]]
#> [1]  62.23892 -38.86406
#> 
#> [[5]]
#> [1]  62.61746 -46.45716
#> 
#> [[6]]
#> [1] 52.376389  3.365971
#> 
#> [[7]]
#> [1] -9.75231 12.60319
#> 
#> [[8]]
#> [1] 175.80868  44.73499
#> 
#> [[9]]
#> [1] -156.92362  -49.66324
#> 
#> [[10]]
#> [1] 124.77210 -26.35133
#> 
ch_position(bbox = c(-120, 30, -110, 60))

#> [1] -119.59587   48.21073
